reasoning: Without access to current standings for the ongoing 2025-2026 NFL season (up to October 26, 2025), I must rely on base rates. Historically, even the strongest Super Bowl favorite during the middle of the regular season rarely has a probability of winning exceeding 15-20%, due to the high variance of single-elimination playoffs and injury risks. Assuming the Kansas City Chiefs remain an elite team led by Mahomes and Reid, their a priori chances would sit around 12-16%. I estimate 13% as a well-calibrated prior for an elite team midway through an unobserved season.
